title: Dr. Catherine González - Pulmonology Specialist
description: Discover the expertise of Dr. Catherine González, a pulmonology physician fully certified in Colombia, now serving Pereira, Risaralda with in-person and virtual consultations in English and Spanish.
schedule_consultation: Schedule a consultation with Dr. Catherine González.
info_description_education: Academic background and specialized certifications in pulmonology.
info_description_experience: Professional career in pulmonology across Colombia and Spain.
info_description_skills: Check out Catherine's key competencies and attributes.
education_fea_pulmonary: Pulmonology Specialist (FEA) — Hospital Universitario Jerez de la Frontera
education_fea_pulmonary_desc: Medical specialization (MIR residency) in Pulmonology, covering chronic respiratory diseases, thoracic oncology, and non-invasive ventilation.
education_thoracic_oncology: Master in Thoracic Oncology — TECH Universidad Tecnológica
education_thoracic_oncology_desc: Advanced studies in thoracic oncology, focusing on the diagnosis and treatment of lung and thoracic tumors.
education_epoc_master: Master in COPD — Universidad CEU San Pablo
education_epoc_master_desc: Advanced specialization in comprehensive COPD management, including early diagnosis strategies and personalized treatment.
education_bronchoscopy: Specialist in Bronchoscopy & Pleural Techniques — Universidad Francisco de Vitoria
education_bronchoscopy_desc: Specialized training in diagnostic and therapeutic bronchoscopic procedures and advanced pleural techniques.
education_doctor: Medical Doctor — Fundación Universitaria Sanitas, Colombia
education_doctor_desc: Medical degree with a focus on patient care and clinical research. Degree recognized in Colombia (2025).
education_nimv_methodology: International Expert Course in NIMV Methodology — International School VMNI
education_nimv_methodology_desc: Advanced training in non-invasive mechanical ventilation techniques for respiratory care.
experience_servisalud_desc: Specialized pulmonology practice in Bogotá, Colombia. Diagnosis and treatment of COPD, asthma, interstitial lung disease, sleep disorders, and pleural pathology.
experience_vithas: Pulmonology Physician — Hospital Vithas Xanit Internacional, Benalmádena
experience_vithas_desc: Specialized pulmonology care at a leading private hospital on the Costa del Sol, Spain. Management of complex patients with chronic respiratory diseases and thoracic oncology.
experience_jerez: Pulmonology Resident — Hospital Universitario Jerez de la Frontera
experience_jerez_desc: MIR residency in Pulmonology with rotations in inpatient care, respiratory ICU, outpatient clinics, bronchoscopy, and thoracic oncology.
experience_sanitas: Medical Doctor — Fundación Universitaria Sanitas, Colombia
experience_sanitas_desc: Foundational experience in patient care and clinical decision-making in Colombia.
skill_teamwork_desc: Effectively collaborates with multidisciplinary teams to ensure the best outcomes for patients.
skill_proactivity_desc: Takes initiative to stay updated on the latest advancements in pulmonology and applies them to practice.
skill_leadership_desc: Strong leadership skills demonstrated in guiding teams and improving institutional practices.
skill_research_desc: Author of peer-reviewed publications and contributor to clinical research in pulmonology.
hero_subheading: Pulmonology specialist trained in Spain, fully certified in Colombia. Expert in COPD, asthma, thoracic oncology, bronchoscopy, and sleep disorders. Offering virtual and in-person consultations in Bogotá and Pereira — in Spanish and English.
email_body:
Dear Dr. Catherine González,

I would like to inquire about your pulmonology services. Please let me know the next steps.

Best regards,
[Your Name]
contact_subtitle: Visit my clinic or get in touch for inquiries and appointments.
contact_address: Centro Comercial Cerritos, Pereira, Risaralda, Colombia
virtual_consultation_desc: Available from anywhere — book a video call
english_available: Consultations available in English and Spanish
testimonial_subtitle: Discover what patients and colleagues have to say about their experiences with Dr. Catherine González. Excellence in pulmonology care starts here.
testimonial_1_feedback: Dr. Catherine González provided exceptional care and made me feel at ease during my treatment. I am forever grateful for her expertise.
testimonial_2_feedback: Working with Dr. González has been an absolute pleasure. Her dedication to her patients and her profession is unparalleled.
testimonial_3_feedback: Thanks to Dr. González, I finally found relief from my chronic respiratory issues. Her personalized approach made all the difference.
services_subtitle: Specialized respiratory care for every patient — virtually or in person.
service_asthma_desc: Diagnosis and personalized management of bronchial asthma.
service_copd_desc: Comprehensive care for Chronic Obstructive Pulmonary Disease.
service_lung_cancer_desc: Diagnosis and follow-up of lung and thoracic tumors.
service_vmni_desc: Advanced NIMV techniques for respiratory failure.
service_ild_desc: Diagnosis and treatment of diffuse parenchymal lung diseases.
service_pneumonia_desc: Treatment of pneumonia and recurrent respiratory infections.
service_sleep_desc: Evaluation and management of sleep apnea and other nocturnal respiratory disorders.
service_bronchoscopy_desc: Diagnostic and therapeutic bronchoscopic procedures with advanced technique.
